name: ORCID_URL
description: URL format of an ORCID (Open Researcher and Contributor ID) identifier. ORCID provides a persistent digital identifier that distinguishes individual researchers and contributes to open scholarly infrastructure.
ExpectedUse: Unambiguous identification of researchers, authors, contributors, and other individuals in scholarly communication, research data management, and academic publishing systems.
Aliases: Open Researcher and Contributor ID URL
